drivers.role: Sole selection rank input for the IRA policy
Completed valuation required; no proxy returns for unresearched names
0 names beyond review threshold; aging research has a lower cap
Book total 0; critical evidence prevents allocation
Position, diversification, turnover, and cash limits; stance is context only

popper_falsifiers: If OOS Sharpe for ML policies falls below gate, champion reverts to IRA Marvin.
If turnover budget is breached, next rebalance scales trades toward prior weights.
If regime shifts to stressed, turnover multiplier and caps tighten automatically.
flags: Turnover cap applied: one-way trade limited to about 10.0%.
